images/image9.jpg.description: A swift aquatic predator that uses its sword-like snout to strike its prey with surgical precision.
images/image9.jpg.name: Swordfish

images/image15.jpg.description: An ancient, slow-moving sentinel of the forest that blends perfectly with its surroundings. It is big as a tree and its bark as hard as iron.
images/image15.jpg.name: Walking Tree

images/image60.jpg.description: An animated but unintelligent mass of rock and clay bound by the magic of the earth. It moves with slow, deliberate force to deliver earth-shaking blows and is very hard to harm.
images/image60.jpg.name: Earth Golem

images/image7.jpg.description: A regal beast combining the majesty of a lion and the keen vision of an eagle. It is a proud creature that likes to eat sheep and attacks from above using the sun to blind its victims.
images/image7.jpg.name: Gryphon

images/image23.jpg.description: Cruel scavengers of the high peaks. Bird-like but with the heads of women, their shrieks can disorient warriors before they swoop in to make them fall from the mountainside.
images/image23.jpg.name: Harpy

images/image63.jpg.description: A swirling, human-sized vortex of unstable air born from raw elemental magic. It has no physical form but strikes with the pressure of a localized hurricane.
images/image63.jpg.name: Wind Fury

images/image37.jpg.description: Slow-moving molten rock given life by the combined magic of fire and earth. It burns everything it touches and is exceptionally resistant to attacks.
images/image37.jpg.name: Lava Golem

images/image65.jpg.description: A fast and aggressive manifestation of pure fire. Its heat is so intense that simply standing near it can ignite you.
images/image65.jpg.name: Fire Elemental

images/image49.jpg.description: The very personification of the fire element, which, alongside other avatars, helped create the world before even life began. This ancient entity is made entirely of flame and molten rock, wielding a fiery sword and a crackling whip of flame to alter the land to its plan.
images/image49.jpg.name: Fire Avatar

images/image14.jpg.description: A fast golem composed of floating metallic rocks crackling with electrical energy. It is bound by magnetic forces, making it relatively fast but more susceptible to damage.
images/image14.jpg.name: Magnetic Golem

images/image79.jpg.description: A very dangerous spark of high-voltage energy that can leap from one metallic rock to another. It moves faster than the eye can follow, leaving ozone and cinders in its wake.
images/image79.jpg.name: Lightning Fury

images/image31.jpg.description: Slow but relentless fallen soldiers raised by a lingering curse. They fight with a mechanical persistence and have no fear of pain or death.
images/image31.jpg.name: Skeletons

images/image48.jpg.description: The lord of the crypt and commander of the dead in it.He isa highly dangerous swordsman and master of the dark paths of magic.
images/image48.jpg.name: Lich King

images/image78.jpg.description: A nightmare beast capable of enslaving entire worlds. This ancient dragon breathes shadow-fire and is largely immune to the elements.
images/image78.jpg.name: Enderdragon
